checkin.journal:
Slept well, I have been tired, been hot at night but then it was fine, today evening feeling much better - worried that I am facing cacao effect
Breakfast with brigita and matjaz
We drove to Mdina - checked out the town
We went to mdina experience video was just ok
Dannys lunch - guys really loved the food and all
We drive to golden bay and visited popeyes village and hiked to Mellieha bay - it was cool
Then stopped in Amorino on the way back
We said goodbye with cosita
Amazing day, lots of laug
